app.name: DomestIQ
app.tagline: Indlela lephephile nalehlakanipha yekuxhumanisa tisebenti nemindeni
search.title: Tfola Tisebenti
consent.title: Imvume yeBufihlakalo
consent.message: Sicokelela futsi sisebentise lwatiso lwakho lwemuntfu ngekwemtsetfo we-POPI Act. Ngekuchubeka, uvuma tindlela tetfu tekulondvolota lwatiso.
landing.hero.subtext: Bantfu labagcina emakhaya eNingizimu Afrika asebenta bafanele lokungaphezu kwekutsembela emavini emilomo. DomestIQ ixhumanisa tisebenti nemakhaya ngco — ngetiphrofayili leticinisekisiwe, kubuyeketa kweliciniso, futsi tisebenti tigcina yonkhe imali letiyentako.
landing.problem.waiting_desc: Tisebenti letinemakhono tihlala ngaphandle kwemasango ema-estate emahora, tetsemba kutsi kukhona lotitodzingako lamuhla.
landing.problem.door_desc: Kute i-ID, kute kubuyeketa, kute tirefurensi. Kumele utsembe nje kutsi lomuntfu nguye latsi nguye.
landing.problem.cash_desc: Kute bufakazi lobubhaliwe. Kute buciniso bemsebenti lowentiwe. Uma imali ingakeneli, kuphelile nje.
landing.worker.body: Sekuphelile ngekuhlala ulindza. Sekuphelile ngekucala phansi njalo uma ulahlekelwa likhasimende. Yenta iphrofayili yakho kanye — kubuyeketa kwakho, tirefurensi, nelidumo lakho kukulandzelela noma ukuphi.
landing.worker.b1_desc: Imisebenti ita lucingweni lwakho. Sekuphelile ngekulindza emasangweni nekubuta.
landing.worker.b2_desc: Wonkhe umsebenti lomuhle utfola kubuyeketa. Konkhe kubuyeketa kuletha umsebenti lolandzelako. Awuphindzi ucale phansi.
landing.worker.b3_desc: Emakhasimende nawo acinisekisiwe. Bona kutsi uya kubani ungakefiki.
landing.worker.b4_desc: Bhalisa ngelucingo lwakho nje. Cindzetela titfombe ukhetse emakhono akho — kute kubhala, kute emafomu.
landing.worker.b5_desc: Sebentisa DomestIQ ngesiSwati, isiZulu, isiXhosa, Afrikaans — tonkhe tilwimi ta-11 tase-SA.
landing.worker.b6_desc: Asitsatsi lutfo emholweni wakho. Hhayi nyalo, hhayi nini.
landing.worker.b7_desc: Uyamati umuntfu lohle? Abelana ngekhodi yakho. Uma bangena, nobabili niyatfola.
landing.worker.b8_desc: Yenta i-CV yebungcweti usuka kuphrofayili yakho. Dawunilodha i-PDF uyisebentise noma kuphi — ngeyakho.
landing.cv.body: Emakhono akho, umlando wemsebenti, nekubuyeketa kwakho — kuguculwe kwaba lidokhumenti lelifanelekile longalinika noma ngubani. Hhayi ye-DomestIQ kuphela. Ngeyakho.
landing.cv.portable: I-CV yakho isebenta noma kuphi. Yiphrinte. Yitfumele nge-imeyili. Yinike esangweni.
landing.client.body: Ema-ID lacinisekisiwe. Kuhlolwa kwemlando. Kubuyeketa kweliciniso lokuvela emakhaya lafana nelakho. Yekela kutsembela kumngane wemngane ucale ucashe ngelwatiso lweliciniso.
landing.client.b1_desc: Sisebenti ngasinye singacinisekisa i-ID yase-SA nekukhululwa kwebugebengu. Ubona ibheji ungakabhuki.
landing.client.b2_desc: Tilinganiso letivela emakhaya langempela. Tirefurensi letibhaliwe longatifundza ungakatsatsi sincumo.
landing.client.b3_desc: Bona tisebenti endzaweni yakho, tihleliwe ngesibanga. Tfola umuntfu losedvutane nawe.
landing.client.b4_desc: Kanye noma njalo. Khetsa lusuku, khetsa sikhatsi, tfumela sicelo. Kuphelile.
landing.how.ws1_desc: Cindzetela titfombe ukhetse emakhono akho. Kute kubhala, kute emafomu, kute i-imeyili lefunekako.
landing.how.ws2_desc: Iphrofayili yakho, silinganiso, nekutfolakala kwakho kubonakala uma bantfu basesha endzaweni yakho.
landing.how.ws3_desc: Yemukela noma wale. Beka tilinganiso nesithedyuli sakho. Nguwe lowubusako.
landing.how.ws4_desc: Umsebenti lomuhle utfola kubuyeketa. Kubuyeketa kuletha kubhuka lokunyenti. Kuyakhula.
landing.how.cs2_desc: Fundza kubuyeketa, bona emabheji ekucinisekiswa, buka umlando wemsebenti.
landing.how.cs3_desc: Tfumela sicelo noma ukhulume kucala. Hlelani emininingwane emkhatsini wenu.
landing.how.cs4_desc: Silinganiso sakho sisite tisebenti letinhle tibonakale. Kugcina umphakhatsi useliciniseni.
landing.services.subtext: Kusuka kulusito lwansuku tonkhe kuya kumisebenti yetandla. Tisebenti tibhalisa loko letikwentako. Wena utfola loyo lomfunako.
landing.stories.s1_quote: Bengijwayele kulindza emaviki emkhatsini wemsebenti. Manje ngitfola kubhuka njalo ngeliviki. Bantfwana bami bangakwati kudla kahle.
landing.stories.s2_quote: Angikwati kufundza kahle kodvwa titfombe tenta kube lula. Ngatibhalisa ngedvwa. Kute lusito lengiludzingile.
landing.stories.s3_quote: Ngaphambili, bengingenabufakazi bekutsi ngiyakhona emsebentini wami. Manje kubuyeketa kwami kukhulumela mine. Emakhasimende ayangetsemba ngingakefiki.
landing.stories.s4_quote: Kutfola umsiti lotsembekile bekusho kubuta bangani utsembe lokuhle. Akuseloko kunjalo.
landing.stories.s5_quote: Ngiyati kutsi ngubani lota endlini yami. Uma unebantfwana, loko kubalulekile kwendlula konkhe.
landing.stories.s6_quote: Ngibeka tilinganiso tami ngedvwa. Kute umuntfu lotsatsa incenye. Ngitfole R8,000 ngenyanga leyendlulile ngeDomestIQ kuphela.
landing.cta.heading_2: Sikhatsi sesifikile kutsi kusebentele wonkhe umuntfu.
landing.cta.body: Sonkhe sisebenti lesiyakha iphrofayili yaso sivula bufakazi bemakhono aso. Wonkhe umuzi lobhuka ngeDomestIQ wakha kutsemba esisitimini. Sikushintja ngalendlela — kuxhumana kunye lokucinisekisiwe ngesikhatsi.
landing.footer.disclaimer: DomestIQ yiphulathifomu yekuxhumanisa. Kute budlelwane bemsebenti lobentiwako emkhatsini wabasebentisi.
landing.trust.t3_desc: Khulumisana ngekuphepha kulenkundla — kute tinombolo takho letabelwanako
landing.faq.a1: Yebo. Tisebenti tigcina yonkhe irandi letiyitfolako — asitsatsi ikhomishini. Iphulathifomu ikhokhelwa ngenkokhelo yesevisi lencane lekhokhelwa ngemakhaya uma abhuka.
landing.faq.a2: Noma nguliphi lucingo lolunenthanethi luyasebenta. DomestIQ isebenta ebhrawuzeni — Android noma iPhone. Kute kudawunilodwa. Ungaze uyifake kusikirini sasekhaya njengeephu.
landing.faq.a3: Tisebenti tilayisha i-ID yase-SA nesitifiketi sekungabi nalicala. Lithimba letfu lihlola emadokhumenti linike ibheji yegolide. Tisebenti leticinisekisiwe titfola kubhuka lokunyenti.
landing.faq.a4: Ngalokuphelele. Ihambisana ne-POPIA. Lwatiso lwakho lu-enkhripthiwe, alutsengiselwa bantfu, futsi lwabelwa ngemvumo yakho kuphela.
landing.faq.a5: Joburg, Cape Town, Durban, Pretoria, PE, nemadolobha langetiwako njalo ngenyanga. Bhalisa nyalo noma indzawo yakho ingakabi khona — siyandzisa ngekushesha.
landing.faq.a6: Sesha sisebenti, hlola iphrofayili nekubuyeketa, bese ucela lusuku nesikhatsi. Sisebenti siyemukela noma sale. Ungaphindze ukhulume naso kucala nihlele emininingwane.
landing.faq.a7: Yebo — wekwenta kanye noma njalo, kokubili kuyasebenta. Udzinga kuhlanta ngoMgcibelo noma umlimi wensimu wamasonto? Kunome yini.
landing.faq.a8: Tonkhe tilwimi ta-11 tase-SA letisemtsetfweni — siNgisi, isiZulu, isiXhosa, Afrikaans, Sesotho, naletinye. Tisebenti tingabhalisa futsi tikhulumisane ngelulwimi lwato letilutsandzako.
landing.cities.subtext: Tisebenti nemakhaya ayaxhumana emadolobheni lamakhulu. Emadolobha langetiwako njalo ngenyanga.
landing.cities.not_listed: Awuliboni lidolobha lakho? Bhalisa noma kunjalo — siyandzisa ngekushesha.
landing.pwa.title: Faka DomestIQ kuSikirini Sasekhaya
landing.pwa.desc: Tfola kufinyelela lokushesha ekubhukeni, emilayetweni, nakulokunye.
